WorkspaceState.title: WorkspaceState
WorkspaceState.description: The persistent complete database state containing SMM workspace settings, tasks, and bots logs.

isUnconfigured.description: Flag to check if the workspace is freshly generated

tgChatIds.description: Map representing individual SMM employee telegram chat IDs

/workspaces/{workspaceId}.description: Stores the SMM workspace custom configurations, lists of SMM tasks, SMM members data, broadcast messages, and employee interactive bot conversation logs.
